name: China Jushi Co., Ltd.
summary: China Jushi Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells fiberglass and its fabrics. The company offers a range of reinforcement fiberglass products, including E-glass and C-glass rovings, chopped strands, powder and emulsion chopped strand mats, and woven rovings. Its products have applications in building materials, infrastructure, electronic and electrical, chemical anti-corrosion, aerospace, transportation, energy saving and environmental protection, and sports and leisure sectors. China Jushi Co., Ltd. serves customers in approximately 80 countries and regions, including North America, the Middle East, Europe, the Southeast Asia, and Africa. The company was formerly known as China Fiberglass Co., Ltd. and changed its name to China Jushi Co., Ltd. in March 2015. China Jushi Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Tongxiang, China.
